title: SSC Informational Meeting – Cook Inlet Salmon SAFE report
summary: The SSC met to receive staff presentations on the Cook Inlet Salmon Stock Assessment and Fishery Evaluation (SAFE) report. In the presentation from NOAA, the SSC received proposed stock definitions, tier assignments, status determination criteria, and harvest specifications, which the SSC was tasked...

title: Little-Known “D1” Lands Protecting 28 Million Acres in Alaska Under Threat
summary: In 1971, President Richard Nixon (surprisingly enough) passed the Alaska Native Claims Settlement Act, which at the time was the largest land claims settlement in U.S. history. One of the most impressive features of the bill was section 17(d)(1) which gave the Interior Secretary the authority to set portions of that land aside to be protected for subsist...

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 8 January, 2024
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 8 January, 2024 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
